List all sources in the brain with stats.

Brain to check: $ARGUMENTS

**Examples:**

```
/dist:sources
/dist:sources brain-legal/
```

**Prints a table:**

```
| Source              | Author          | Year | Claims | Entities | Chunks |
|---------------------|-----------------|------|--------|----------|--------|
| Rich Dad Poor Dad   | Robert Kiyosaki | 1997 | 66     | 16       | 20     |
| Art of Money Getting| P.T. Barnum     | 1880 | 79     | 23       | yes    |
| ...                 | ...             | ...  | ...    | ...      | ...    |

Total: 4 sources, 285 claims, 62 entities
```
